overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person vehicle driving through a flooded, rain-soaked dystopian city at night. The vehicle navigates through makeshift camps, debris, and barricades under artificial street lighting with a neon-soaked atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban underpass with makeshift camp

events.description: vehicle begins moving forward from stationary position under the overpass

agents.ego_description: starting the vehicle and beginning to drive through the flooded underpass camp area

entered.detail: concrete structure overhead providing shelter from rain
water-covered street surface reflecting street lights
cluster of tents and temporary shelters with debris
large concrete blocks lining the road edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a concrete overpass at night during heavy rain. The vehicle is positioned at a flooded urban camp with makeshift structures visible to the right. The driver starts moving forward through the waterlogged street, passing concrete barriers on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift camp with barricades and tents

events.description: moving from underpass shelter into open rain-exposed camp area
slowing down to carefully navigate through tight barricade passages

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering through narrow passages between red and white barricades and camp structures

entered.detail: construction barriers with red and white stripes blocking parts of the road
temporary canvas shelters and umbrellas in the camp
rough wooden platforms and structures supporting the camp
metal barrels with fires providing light and heat

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves deeper into the makeshift camp, navigating through tight spaces between red and white striped barriers. Tents and wooden scaffolding line the left side while burning barrels illuminate the right. The rain is now fully exposed overhead as the driver carefully maneuvers through the cluttered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered camp area transitioning to open road

events.description: exiting dense camp area into more open street with fewer obstacles

agents.ego_description: navigating around debris and turning slightly while leaving the dense camp area

entered.detail: street signs and directional markers visible ahead
metal safety barriers along the road edge
tall structures and neon-lit buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the camp, passing the last of the tents and wooden structures. The road opens up ahead with guard rails appearing on the right and distant buildings becoming visible through the rain. The driver turns slightly to avoid remaining debris while accelerating.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with street lighting

events.description: accelerating to higher speed on the open unobstructed road

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the open wet road passing under street lights and neon signs

entered.detail: tall street lights illuminating the wet road surface
white and yellow painted lines on the asphalt
glowing blue and red signage on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Now on an open urban street, the vehicle accelerates past 50 km/h. Street lamp posts line the left side while guard rails run along the right. Neon signs glow in the distance through the rain, and road markings become clearly visible on the wet asphalt.

events.description: approaching red traffic light at intersection
turning right at the intersection while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection, observing the red traffic light, and executing a right turn onto another street

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red light
road junction with crosswalk markings and signage
tall solid fence running along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an urban intersection marked by overhead traffic lights showing red. After slowing slightly, the driver executes a right turn onto a new street lined with fence barriers on the right. The rain continues to fall heavily as the vehicle proceeds through the dystopian cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive from a cramped, flooded urban camp into the open, neon-lit streets of a rain-soaked dystopian city. It begins under a concrete overpass, moving forward through waterlogged streets past makeshift structures and concrete barriers. As the vehicle pushes deeper into the camp, the environment tightens between red and white striped barriers, wooden scaffolding, and burning barrels before the passage gradually opens up. The scene then expands onto a wide urban road where the vehicle accelerates past street lamps and glowing neon signs, the wet asphalt reflecting the city lights. Finally, the camera approaches a red traffic light at an intersection, executing a right turn past fence barriers to continue deeper into the heavy rain of the cityscape.
